text_original: pics dont match description given in chat, free messages are a small daily amount. gotta subscribe, then buy tokens....
text_zh: 照片与聊天中的描述不符，免费消息每日额度很少。必须先订阅，然后再买代币……
reply_original:
I'm sorry for the frustration. Regarding images, please send screenshots of the mismatch to support@fantachat.ai. If verified as a system error, we will compensate your gems!

For chats, high-quality AI incurs high server costs, but we're working on more ways to earn free messages. We'd love to help you further via email!
reply_zh:
非常抱歉给您带来了困扰。关于图片问题，请将不匹配的截图发送至 support@fantachat.ai。如果经核实确为系统错误，我们将补偿您的钻石！

关于聊天，高质量的 AI 会产生高昂的服务器成本，但我们正在努力开发更多赚取免费消息额度的方法。我们很乐意通过邮件为您提供进一步的帮助！
